title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried multiple times but keeps getting an error.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to buy using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing without sufficient reason.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the system. The download button is unresponsive.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city. They updated it but it still displays the old one.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture but gets an error.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle is disabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but didn't receive a confirmation email even though payment succeeded.

title: Password Reset Not Working
description: Customer clicked the reset password link but it expired or didn't work properly.

title: Feature Not Available in Region
description: Customer's region doesn't have access to a particular feature that should be available.

title: Account Locked After Failed Login
description: After multiple failed login attempts, customer's account got locked temporarily.

title: Notification Settings Not Saving
description: Customer changes notification preferences but they revert back after logout.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: Customer reports that the website is loading very slowly, affecting their user experience.
